narrative:
Greene County has 117,884 registered voters, with 54.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.6 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 27.8% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -4.6% D−R vs -26.6% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
